'''Voal''' was the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who commanded the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']], during its construction in the [[Patriim system/Legends|Patriim system]].<ref name="marvel51" />

==Biography==
Voal and an important number of officers aboard the ''Tarkin'' wanted to eliminate [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. They feared and hated him, because of his senseless disregard for his subordinates, especially after [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Kuhru]] failed to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="marvel51" />

When [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Nord (Imperial)|Nord]] decided to fire the [[Ion cannon/Legends|ionic cannon]] aboard the ''Tarkin'' to destroy Luke Skywalker and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] exploded. It had been sabotaged by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]], and tore itself apart when fired. Voal and all the Imperial personnel aboard were killed.
